question_text: Let the set of functional dependencies F = {QR → S, R → P, S → Q} hold on a relation schema X = (PQRS). X is not in BCNF. Suppose X is decomposed into two schemas Y and Z where Y = (PR) and Z = (QRS).

options.C: onsider the two statements given below:
options.B: oth Y and Z are in BCNF II.
options.D: ecomposition of X into Y and Z is dependency preserving and lossless Which of the above statements is/are correct?
